name: interviewai-arabia
description: InterviewAI Arabia — frontend (admin dashboard + Expo web). Deploys to Vercel as static. API lives in InterviewAI-Arabia-Backend.

scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix admin && npm install --include=dev --prefix mobile
scripts.build:admin: npm run build --prefix admin && rm -rf public/admin && mkdir -p public && cp -r admin/dist public/admin
scripts.build:web: npm run build:web --prefix mobile && rm -rf public/web && cp -r mobile/dist public/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build:admin && npm run build:web
